title: <div>All is Lost  Takahashi reaches his lowest point, refusing to accept his new
content:
All is Lost Takahashi reaches his lowest point, refusing to accept his new reality.
Climax Through sheer willpower, the characters push forward, confronting their demons and choosing growth.
Resolution Nomiya finds a renewed passion, Takahashi starts rehabilitation, and Togawa remains fiercely dedicated.

3. Vagabond – Beat Breakdown

Beat Description
Opening Image A battlefield—Musashi stands alone, a survivor.
Setup Musashi’s raw, violent nature is established, but his path is uncertain.
Inciting Incident After a near-death experience, he begins questioning his purpose as a warrior.
Rising Tension Musashi travels, fighting stronger opponents, developing his philosophy.
Midpoint (False Victory) He defeats a powerful foe, believing himself to be near enlightenment.
All is Lost A humbling defeat forces him to reconsider everything.
Climax He realizes true mastery isn’t about brute strength—it’s a deeper, lifelong journey.
Resolution The road continues, with no final destination—only endless learning.
context: From document: The Graphic Novel Writing Guide for Derek: Inspiration, Structure… — chunk 4 (chunk 4/22)
